body: Amara, hope you're having a good week — I wanted to circle back on our conversation from the climate infrastructure roundtable last month and pass along a name that came up in my portfolio reviews. There's a founder I've been watching closely, [Sena Agyemang](people/sena-agyemang), who's building grid-edge optimization software with a really compelling angle on demand flexibility at the distribution level. I think the thesis maps well to what [Halfway Capital](orgs/halfway-capital) has been looking for on the climate infrastructure side, and she's just starting to think about a seed round. I know you're selective about inbound at this stage, but given how well-calibrated your eye has been on the energy software deals, I figured this was worth a direct note rather than a cold intro. Would love to get your read on whether this fits your current focus — happy to set up a three-way call if the initial description resonates.
